title: phryne pinnatifida subsp. boryi
intro: Phryne pinnatifida subsp. boryi, also known as the Phryne boryi, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Phryne boryi include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
